description: Call GET /api/v1/google/scholar/cite/search for Google SERP Scholar Cite Search through Just Serp API with query.

operations.description: Get Google scholar Citations data, including export links, for bibliography automation and citation workflows.

parameters.description: The unique ID of a Google Scholar search result to retrieve citation formats for. Found in the 'id' field of previous Scholar Search responses.
parameters.name: query

parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.
parameters.name: language

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
